title: Red-eyed
description: Hostile, neutral and friendly mobs glowing eyes.
body:
![Red-eyed logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BloKr9Vy/images/7999e82cf7970e9ac8636f2feb69903cc6d544d3.png)

### Adds red(and white) glowing eyes to almost all hostile mobs. You might have seen something similar in old minecraft animations.
# About resource pack📄:
Added glowing eyes to zombies _(husks and zombie villagers too)_, skeletons _(wither skeletons and strays too)_, creepers, blazes, hoglins _(zoglins too)_, piglins _(brute piglins and zombificated piglins too)_, zombie horses and skeleton horses

**Hoglins, zoglins, piglins, zombificated piglins and strays have white eyes**

## Here's what it looks like:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

 ![Skeleton rider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dab50c5025d1789cf0300b8a428307f73828c36.png)
